channel.title: Comments for page "Joke SCPs - Tales Edition"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Joke SCPs - Tales Edition"

item.title: Joke SCPs Tales Edition is up!
item.content:encoded:
Sometimes more famous than the actual skips themselves, it's time to see what the wider scope of fiction on this site has done with the Joke SCPs! We can always have more comedy on this site. This is open to editing, so put tales if any are posted based on a -J article!

Happy reading.
